subcodes.title: Epistle to Haji Mirza Aqasi 1
subcodes.first_line: Read thou the Book wherein is remembered the Name of thy Lord, revealed from the presence of the true and manifest Imam. Verily it is a Book that hath been sent down through the wisdom of thy Lord from the presence of 'Alí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اقرء کتاب ذکر اسم ربک من لدن امام حق مبین و انه لکتاب قد نزل من حکم ربک من لدن علی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
